name: Egyptian Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together flour and baking powder in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, cream butter until smooth. Add sugar and mix well.
4. Beat eggs into the mixture, then stir in milk and vanilla.
5. Mix in chocolate, spices, and coffee.
6. Pour batter into greased cake pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
